cost_analysis.note: Backtest plays each suggestion against every historical draw.

prev_suggestions_performance.note: No draws occurred after suggestions were generated.

analysis.llm_summary: Top candidates were selected based on the highest scores from the candidate shortlist, ensuring strong alignment with the most frequent digits per position and avoiding duplicates. The top5 are the highest scoring and most consistent with position frequency trends, and top50 extends this selection maintaining score order and digit frequency relevance.
